Class LobbyController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.LobbyController
All Implemented Interfaces:
GUIObserver
public class LobbyController extends Object implements GUIObserver
JavaFX controller for the lobby screen. Handles player login, game creation/joining, and transitions to the game screen once the match starts.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LobbyController(ServerRemoteInterface serverStub, ClientVirtualView clientHandler, javafx.stage.Stage stage)
    Creates the lobby controller and registers this observer with the client view.

    Called when the server sends an error message during the lobby phase.

    onActionAvailableChanged, onAskExtraDraw, onBoardInitialized, onBottomBuildRemoved, onBottomCardRemoved, onCardAddedToTribe, onDefaultTileOrderChanged, onEventResolved, onMarketInitialized, onPlayerDisconnected, onPlayerFoodChanged, onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile, onPlayerPPChanged, onPlayerReconnected, onPlayerToPlaceChanged, onPlayerToPlayChanged, onServerDead, onTopBuildingRefreshed, onTopBuildRemoved, onTopCardRefreshed, onTopCardRemoved, onWinners

  • Constructor Details

    • LobbyController

      public LobbyController(ServerRemoteInterface serverStub, ClientVirtualView clientHandler, javafx.stage.Stage stage)
      Creates the lobby controller and registers this observer with the client view.
      Parameters:
      serverStub - the remote server interface used to create or join a game.
      clientHandler - the local client view that receives notifications from the server.
      stage - the JavaFX stage on which the lobby will be displayed.

  • Method Details

    • showing

      public void showing()
      Loads the FXML and displays the lobby.

    • onPlayerAdded

      public void onPlayerAdded(PlayerDTO player)
      Called when a new player joins the lobby. Adds the nickname and totem colour to the visible UI list.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerAdded in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      player - the DTO of the player added to the lobby.

    • onError

      public void onError(String message)
      Called when the server sends an error message during the lobby phase. Displays the message in the status label.
      Specified by:
      onError in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      message - the error text received from the server.

    • onGamePhaseChanged

      public void onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE gamePhase)
      Called when the game phase changes. If the phase is not SETUP and the game screen has not yet been shown, starts the transition to the game screen.
      Specified by:
      onGamePhaseChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      gamePhase - the new game phase received from the server.

    • onRankReceived

      public void onRankReceived(Map<Integer, List<String>> leaderboards)
      Called from the network thread when the server returns the leaderboard. Populates the dialog opened by onShowRank with sections for 2, 3, 4 and 5 player games.
      Specified by:
      onRankReceived in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      leaderboards - a map from player count to ordered list of leaderboard row strings.
